root: ^Great job! The train arrived on time and we now have more commissions of trains that want to go to Sörena
^There is going to be one from Ariëta followed by one from Ësie, and this sounds like a great opportunity to practice junctions
^If you overlaps two rails going in different directions, a junction will appear from them!
^You can then use the configure tool and right click on the junction to adjust its path
^Make sure that the link is going from and to the path you want! If it's not also linking the source the train will derail!
